heading: Affiliated persons
label: 3823 Affiliated persons
text: If a person is affected by a reduction in benefits under and the affected person is affiliated with other persons for the purpose of receiving the benefits, the benefits of each affiliated person shall be reduced under in proportion to the interest held by the affiliated person.section 3821 of this titlesection 3821 of this title
